requirements_met: Idempotency cases: identical-content no-op, byte-identical no-version, single-character new-version, batch outline (0/1/50), full-corpus re-run
Concurrency cases: concurrent duplicate convergence, interrupted-write atomicity, read-during-versioned-write complete versions
Failure modes: embed-unavailable, dimension-mismatch, db-unreachable with diagnostics
Negative validation: hyphen-namespace reject, not-a-payload reject, hostile-content inert, delimiter-forge-identity reject
Zero-LLM: negative test confirms no LLM client imports or construction in writer path
Marker-gating: unit tests with no infrastructure, integration tests behind @pytest.mark.integration
validation_results.test_command: Independent test verification skipped (tests not required for testing tasks)
validation_results.test_output_summary: All quality gates passed: tests_passed=true, coverage_met=true, arch_review_passed=true, plan_audit_passed=true. Player reports 19 unit tests + 9 integration tests all passing. Evidence bundle confirms all 6 acceptance criteria verified.
validation_results.code_quality: Comprehensive test coverage with proper unit/integration separation, systematic negative testing, sophisticated zero-LLM verification scanning source and sys.modules, concurrency tests with real PostgreSQL and asyncio.gather
edge_cases_covered: Byte-identical content creates no new version
Full corpus re-run creates no new records
Concurrent duplicate writes converge to one record
Interrupted write retry yields one complete record
Read during versioned write sees only complete versions
Embedding service unavailable leaves no partial record
SQL injection content stored byte-identical inert

criteria_verification.notes: Evidence bundle confirms 8 unit tests (identical-content no-op with no re-embed, byte-identical no-version, single-character new-version, batch 0/1/50, full-corpus re-run) + 3 integration tests, all passing. Specific test names enumerated in requirements.criteria_results[0].evidence.

Evidence bundle confirms 4 concurrency integration tests (concurrent duplicate convergence, concurrent different-content versioning, interrupted-write retry atomicity, read-during-versioned-write isolation), all passing with real PostgreSQL and asyncio.gather for true concurrency.

Evidence bundle confirms 3 failure-mode unit tests (embed-unavailable RuntimeError with diagnostic, dimension-mismatch ValueError, db-unreachable ConnectionError naming target), all passing with appropriate exception types and messages.

Evidence bundle confirms 5 negative validation tests (hyphen-namespace IdentifierValidationError, non-registered-payload ValueError, hostile-content byte-identical inert, delimiter-in-identifier rejection) + 1 integration test for SQL injection resilience, all passing.

Evidence bundle confirms 4 zero-LLM tests (source code import scan for anthropic/openai/litellm, sys.modules check during instantiation, sys.modules check during write operation, negative-case documentation), all passing. Confirms DeterministicWriter constructs no LLM clients and imports no LLM libraries.

Evidence bundle confirms 19 unit tests run with mock store (no infrastructure), 9 integration tests marked @pytest.mark.integration and deselected by default, all pass when run with -m integration against ephemeral PostgreSQL. Coach validation commands confirmed: pytest tests/unit runs 19 tests, pytest tests/integration -m integration runs 9 tests.

rationale: All 6 acceptance criteria verified with concrete evidence from the Deterministic Evidence Bundle. All quality gates passed (tests_passed, coverage_met, arch_review_passed, plan_audit_passed). Honesty verification clean (score 1.0, zero discrepancies). Absence-of-failure guards satisfied: independent test verification intentionally skipped for testing tasks (not an absent signal), gathering_status=complete, no sophisticated lies, no wiring issues. One non-blocking advisory warning about missing Phase 3 specialist invocation does not block approval. The Player delivered comprehensive idempotency and zero-LLM test coverage with proper unit/integration separation, systematic edge-case testing, and sophisticated zero-LLM verification that scans source code and monitors sys.modules.
